div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Haiti (Bailly-Blanchard)
div.p: 9. Department’s No. 82, September 27, 6 p.m., No. 89, October 11, 6 p.m., No. 94, October 18, 6 p.m., and No. 1, January 5, 1 p.m.No. 94 printed in Foreign Relations, 1920, vol. ii, p. 813; the others not printed.

The Department is unable to understand why no reply has been received from you to above cable instructions to report to Department the modifications recommended by you and the Treaty officials interested in the laws or projects mentioned in your August 20, 11 a.m.Ibid., p. 776.
It is necessary for the Department to have this report prior to arriving at a decision upon this subject, and unless you have already forwarded such report you will do so immediately by cable.
